column1: # Seed corpus for the local speculative n-gram model (core/src/ngram.rs).
# Each line is one observed conversion the model trains on, tab-separated:
# The pinyin must segment into exactly as many syllables as there are Han
# characters (one syllable per character) — the same alignment rule learn()
# enforces — otherwise the line is skipped. `weight` (optional, default 1) is how
# many times the pair is counted, used to bias the unigram back-off toward the
# most common reading of a syllable. Lines starting with `#` and blank lines are
# This is a small, hand-curated high-frequency vocabulary, not a full language
# model: it covers the everyday words and phrases where an instant local guess
# matters most. It is embedded into the core at build time, so every frontend
# ships with speculation working out of the box; the model keeps learning the
# user's own phrasing on top of it.
